text: Walking through this corridor, the mixture of harsh white light and the faintly glowing blue room ahead makes me feel a strange sense of anticipation. The glass and sharp lines suggest innovation, while the neon blue invites curiosity and a touch of anxiety. Entering the R+D space, I am surrounded by futuristic displays and vibrant colors. The focus on research and development energizes me intellectually—I feel small but inspired, as if on the edge of new discoveries. The artificiality and careful design provoke questions about the nature of progress and our place within these technological landscapes.
